name: warmpath-extract
description: WarmPath: natural-language question -> target skill + intent, as strict JSON.
_note: No `prompt` node on purpose. A `prompt` node fed by a long-lived `webhook` source never closes, so it accumulates every request it has ever seen into its Context and replays them: call N returns the answers for calls 1..N and latency grows without bound. `question` -> llm is stateless. The system instructions therefore travel in the request body (see functions/prompts.js).
